---
title: "Chinese Development Projects Analysis"
author: ""
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    page-layout: full
    grid:
      body-width: 1400px
      margin-width: 100px
jupyter: python3
---

## Overview

This analysis visualizes Chinese development projects around the world using data from AidData's China's Global Loans and Grants Dataset, Version 1.0.

## Geographic Distribution of Projects

:::panel-tabset
### Flat Map View
```{python}
from CLG import clg, create_flat_map_visualization

fig = create_flat_map_visualization(clg)
fig.show()
```
:::
